caption: A person's hands hold a basketball trading card over a red and black playmat featuring a large logo. The card, which depicts a basketball player in a white jersey with the number 50, is held against a black box labeled "OBSIDIAN" and "2 AUTOGRAPHS." As the sequence progresses, the person adjusts their grip on the card, tilting it to show its reflective, holographic surface and blue geometric patterns. To the right of the main action, small inset video windows show a man in a black jacket sitting in a room with white walls and electronic equipment, as well as a shot of a sealed pack of cards. The text "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM" appears as a watermark on the playmat. The lighting is bright, emphasizing the metallic sheen of the card as it is moved in front of the camera.
